case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC VS THOMAS, CURTIS G.

docket_entries.description: POS AS TO CURTIS G THOMAS, FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGEMEN T FILED. THIS SERVICE WAS DONE BY MAIL BY THE PLAI NTIFF.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, CURTIS G.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 443419 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, CURTIS G.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, CURTIS G. $1,527.22 PRINCIPAL, $1,486.22 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,027.44, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO 443419.JUDMT RENDERED ON 9/27/85.
